attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT BK_DEAL_ID,PRODUCT_ID,LIST_OF_PROMOTION_LINE_LEVEL,RANK () OVER ( ORDER BY LIST_OF_PROMOTION_LINE_LEVEL )  RANK_1  FROM $$STGDB.WI_SO_POS_LL_NAMES
WHERE LIST_OF_PROMOTION_LINE_LEVEL IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY 1,2,3

SELECT 
BK_DEAL_ID
,PRODUCT_ID
,LIST_OF_PROMOTION_LINE_LEVEL
FROM 
$$STGDB.WI_SO_POS_LL_NAMES
WHERE ( BK_DEAL_ID , PRODUCT_ID)
NOT IN (SELECT  BK_DEAL_ID , PRODUCT_ID FROM $$STGDB.WI_SO_POS_LL_PROMO_NAME_FINAL)
group by 1,2,3

/*HPE Fix 2*/
SELECT 
BK_DEAL_ID, 
PRODUCT_ID, 
DISCOUNT_NAME, 
DRVD_PROMOTION_NAME, 
SOURCE_REPORTED_PROMOTION_CD, 
CONCESSION_PERCENT, 
CONCESSION_USD_AMT,
'' AS ACTIVE_YORN, 
'Y' AS HPEFIX_YORN 
FROM 
(
	SELECT  
	NDQ.BK_DEAL_ID,
	HPE.PRODUCT_ID,  
	'HPE Competitive-UCS -- US' AS DISCOUNT_NAME,
	CASE   
		WHEN 
		NDQLC.SOURCE_REPORTED_PROMOTION_NAME = 'UNKNOWN' 
		THEN NDQLC.DISCOUNT_NAME 
			WHEN 
			NDQLC.SOURCE_REPORTED_PROMOTION_NAME IS NULL 
			THEN 
			NDQLC.DISCOUNT_NAME 
		ELSE NDQLC.SOURCE_REPORTED_PROMOTION_NAME 
	END AS 
	DRVD_PROMOTION_NAME,
	SOURCE_REPORTED_PROMOTION_CD, 
	CONCESSION_PERCENT, 
	CONCESSION_USD_AMT
	FROM 
	( 
		SELECT 
		BK_DEAL_ID, 
		PRODUCT_ID 
		FROM  
		$$STGDB.WI_SO_POS_DISCOUNT_NAME 
		WHERE 
		DISCOUNT_NAME IS NULL  
		GROUP BY 1,2 
	) HPE
	LEFT OUTER JOIN 
	$$SLSORDVWDB.N_DEAL_QUOTE NDQ 
	ON  HPE.BK_DEAL_ID = NDQ.BK_DEAL_ID
	LEFT OUTER JOIN 
	$$SLSORDVWDB.N_DEAL_QUOTE_LINE NDQL 
	ON (NDQ.BK_QUOTE_NUM   = NDQL.BK_QUOTE_NUM AND NDQL.ACTIVE_FLG = 'Y'  ) 
	LEFT OUTER JOIN 
	$$SLSORDVWDB.N_DEAL_QUOTE_LINE_CONCESSION NDQLC 
	ON NDQLC.BK_DEAL_QUOTE_LINE_KEY = NDQL.BK_DEAL_QUOTE_LINE_KEY
	INNER JOIN 
	$$COMREFVWDB.R_PRODUCTS R 
	ON R.ITEM_KEY=NDQL.PRODUCT_KEY AND HPE.PRODUCT_ID || '=' =  R.BK_PRODUCT_ID 
	WHERE 
	1 = 1 
	AND NDQ.ACTIVE_FLG = 'Y'  
	AND (NDQ.IS_STRINGENT_FLG='Y' OR NDQ.IS_FINALIZED_FLG='Y')
	GROUP BY 
	1,2,3,4,5,6,7
)A

SELECT 
BK_DEAL_ID, 
PRODUCT_ID, 
LIST_OF_PROMOTION_LINE_LEVEL 
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_SO_POS_LL_PROMO_NAME_INT1
WHERE
1=2

/*HPE Fix 1*/
SELECT 
BK_DEAL_ID, 
PRODUCT_ID, 
DISCOUNT_NAME, 
DRVD_PROMOTION_NAME,
SOURCE_REPORTED_PROMOTION_CD, 
CONCESSION_PERCENT, 
CONCESSION_USD_AMT,
'' AS ACTIVE_YORN, 
'Y' AS HPEFIX_YORN 
FROM 
(
	SELECT  
	NDQ.BK_DEAL_ID,HPE.PRODUCT_ID,  
	'HPE Competitive-UCS -- US' AS DISCOUNT_NAME,
	CASE   
		WHEN 
		NDQLC.SOURCE_REPORTED_PROMOTION_NAME = 'UNKNOWN' 
		THEN 
		NDQLC.DISCOUNT_NAME 
			WHEN 
			NDQLC.SOURCE_REPORTED_PROMOTION_NAME IS NULL 
			THEN 
			NDQLC.DISCOUNT_NAME 
		ELSE 
		NDQLC.SOURCE_REPORTED_PROMOTION_NAME 
	END AS 
	DRVD_PROMOTION_NAME,
	SOURCE_REPORTED_PROMOTION_CD,
	NDQL.SOURCE_UPDATED_DTM, 
	CONCESSION_PERCENT, 
	CONCESSION_USD_AMT
	FROM 
	( 
		SELECT 
		BK_DEAL_ID,  
		PRODUCT_ID, 
		SUBSTR(PRODUCT_ID, 0, CHARACTERS(PRODUCT_ID)) AS  PID_NEW  
		FROM 
		$$STGDB.WI_SO_POS_DISCOUNT_NAME 
		WHERE 
		DISCOUNT_NAME IS NULL 
		AND  SUBSTR(PRODUCT_ID, CHARACTERS(PRODUCT_ID)) =  '=' GROUP BY 1,2
	) HPE
	LEFT OUTER JOIN 
	$$SLSORDVWDB.N_DEAL_QUOTE NDQ 
	ON  HPE.BK_DEAL_ID = NDQ.BK_DEAL_ID
	LEFT OUTER JOIN 
	$$SLSORDVWDB.N_DEAL_QUOTE_LINE NDQL 
	ON (NDQ.BK_QUOTE_NUM   = NDQL.BK_QUOTE_NUM AND NDQL.ACTIVE_FLG = 'Y'  ) 
	LEFT OUTER JOIN 
	$$SLSORDVWDB.N_DEAL_QUOTE_LINE_CONCESSION NDQLC 
	ON NDQLC.BK_DEAL_QUOTE_LINE_KEY = NDQL.BK_DEAL_QUOTE_LINE_KEY
	INNER JOIN 
	$$COMREFVWDB.R_PRODUCTS R 
	ON R.ITEM_KEY=NDQL.PRODUCT_KEY 
	AND HPE.PID_NEW = R.BK_PRODUCT_ID
	WHERE 
	1 = 1 
	AND NDQ.ACTIVE_FLG = 'Y'  
	AND (NDQ.IS_STRINGENT_FLG='Y' OR NDQ.IS_FINALIZED_FLG='Y')
	GROUP BY 
	1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8
)A

SELECT 
WI_SO_POS_DISCOUNT_NAME.BK_DEAL_ID,
WI_SO_POS_DISCOUNT_NAME.PRODUCT_ID,
WI_SO_POS_DISCOUNT_NAME.PROMOTION_NAME,
WI_SO_POS_DISCOUNT_NAME.DISCOUNT_NAME,
WI_SO_POS_DISCOUNT_NAME.SOURCE_REPORTED_PROMOTION_CD,
WI_SO_POS_DISCOUNT_NAME.DISCOUNT_PERCENT,
WI_SO_POS_DISCOUNT_NAME.DISCOUNT_AMOUNT,
WI_SO_POS_DISCOUNT_NAME.ACTIVE_YORN,
WI_SO_POS_DISCOUNT_NAME.HPEFIX_YORN 
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_SO_POS_DISCOUNT_NAME

SELECT 
BK_DEAL_ID,PRODUCT_ID,LIST_OF_PROMOTION_LINE_LEVEL,'Y'
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_PROMO_1 A
WHERE 
NOT EXISTS 
(SELECT BK_DEAL_ID,PRODUCT_ID,LIST_OF_PROMOTION_LINE_LEVEL
FROM 
$$STGDB.WI_SO_POS_LL_NAMES B
WHERE A.BK_DEAL_ID=B.BK_DEAL_ID
AND A.PRODUCT_ID=B.PRODUCT_ID
AND A.LIST_OF_PROMOTION_LINE_LEVEL=B.LIST_OF_PROMOTION_LINE_LEVEL)

SELECT 
WI_SO_POS_DISCOUNT_NAME.BK_DEAL_ID,
WI_SO_POS_DISCOUNT_NAME.PRODUCT_ID,
WI_SO_POS_DISCOUNT_NAME.PROMOTION_NAME,
WI_SO_POS_DISCOUNT_NAME.DISCOUNT_NAME,
WI_SO_POS_DISCOUNT_NAME.SOURCE_REPORTED_PROMOTION_CD,
WI_SO_POS_DISCOUNT_NAME.DISCOUNT_PERCENT,
WI_SO_POS_DISCOUNT_NAME.DISCOUNT_AMOUNT,
WI_SO_POS_DISCOUNT_NAME.ACTIVE_YORN,
WI_SO_POS_DISCOUNT_NAME.HPEFIX_YORN
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_SO_POS_DISCOUNT_NAME

SELECT 
WI.BK_DEAL_ID,
WI.PRODUCT_ID,
CASE 
	WHEN 
	NPI.PRICING_INCENTIVE_TYPE_CD  IN ('NON-STANDARD') 
	THEN 
	WI.PROMOTION_NAME 
END NON_STANDARD_NAME_LINE_LEVEL,
CASE 
	WHEN NPI.PRICING_INCENTIVE_TYPE_CD  IN( 'NON-STANDARD') 
	THEN 
	'Y' 
	ELSE 
	'N' 
END AS CTR_FLG
FROM 
$$STGDB.WI_SO_POS_DISCOUNT_NAME WI
LEFT OUTER JOIN 
$$SLSORDVWDB.N_PRICING_INCENTIVE NPI 
ON  WI.PROMOTION_NAME=NPI.BK_PRICING_INCENTIVE_NAME
WHERE 
( BK_DEAL_ID ,PRODUCT_ID) IN
(
	SELECT 
	TEMP.BK_DEAL_ID,
	TEMP.PRODUCT_ID 
	FROM 
	$$STGDB.WI_SO_POS_LL_NAMES TEMP,
	(
		SELECT 
		BK_DEAL_ID ,
		PRODUCT_ID ,
		COUNT(DISTINCT COALESCE(NON_STANDARD_NAME_LINE_LEVEL ,'UNK')) CNT 
		FROM 
		$$STGDB.WI_SO_POS_LL_NAMES
		GROUP BY 
		1,2
		HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT COALESCE(NON_STANDARD_NAME_LINE_LEVEL ,'UNK'))=1
	) A
	WHERE 
	TEMP.BK_DEAL_ID=A.BK_DEAL_ID
	AND TEMP.PRODUCT_ID=A.PRODUCT_ID
	AND TEMP.NON_STANDARD_NAME_LINE_LEVEL  IS NULL
)
AND NON_STANDARD_NAME_LINE_LEVEL  IS NOT NULL
and  WI.BK_DEAL_ID <>'-9999'
AND WI.DISCOUNT_PERCENT  <> 0 
AND WI.SOURCE_REPORTED_PROMOTION_CD NOT LIKE 'PP%'
GROUP BY 
1,2,3,4

/*TradeIN Fix*/
SELECT  
A.BK_DEAL_ID, 
A.PRODUCT_ID, 
'' as PROMOTION_NAME, 
'Trade In' as DISCOUNT_NAME,
'' as SOURCE_REPORTED_PROMOTION_CD,  
'' as DISCOUNT_PERCENT, 
'' as DISCOUNT_AMOUNT, 
'' AS ACTIVE_YORN, 
'' AS HPEFIX_YORN  
FROM
( 
	SELECT 
	DISTINCT BK_DEAL_ID AS BK_DEAL_ID, 
	PRODUCT_ID AS PRODUCT_ID 
	FROM 
	$$STGDB.WI_SO_POS_DISCOUNT_NAME
	WHERE  
	(BK_DEAL_ID,PRODUCT_ID) 
	NOT IN 
	(
		select 
		BK_DEAL_ID,
		PRODUCT_ID  
		FROM 
		$$STGDB.WI_SO_POS_DISCOUNT_NAME 
		WHERE 
		DISCOUNT_NAME LIKE 'Trade%'  
		GROUP BY 
		BK_DEAL_ID,PRODUCT_ID
	) 
	AND DISCOUNT_NAME IS NULL
)A
JOIN
(
	SELECT 
	NDQ.BK_DEAL_ID, 
	P.BK_PRODUCT_ID, 
	SUM(COALESCE(TRADE_IN_DISCOUNT_USD_AMT,0)) TRADEINUSD
	FROM 
	$$SLSORDVWDB.N_DEAL_QUOTE NDQ
	LEFT OUTER JOIN 
	$$SLSORDVWDB.N_DEAL_QUOTE_LINE NDQL 
	ON (NDQ.BK_QUOTE_NUM = NDQL.BK_QUOTE_NUM)
	INNER JOIN 
	$$COMREFVWDB.R_PRODUCTS P 
	ON P.ITEM_KEY = NDQL.PRODUCT_KEY
	WHERE 
	NDQ.ACTIVE_FLG = 'Y'  
	GROUP BY 1,2 
	HAVING  SUM(COALESCE(TRADE_IN_DISCOUNT_USD_AMT,0)) <> 0
) B
ON A.BK_DEAL_ID = B.BK_DEAL_ID 
AND A.PRODUCT_ID = B.BK_PRODUCT_ID

/*POS Snapshot active Lines*/
SELECT 
TIER.BK_DEAL_ID,
R.BK_PRODUCT_ID,
TIER.SUB_PROMOTION_DESCR,
CASE   
	WHEN 
	NDQLC.SOURCE_REPORTED_PROMOTION_NAME = 'UNKNOWN' 
	THEN 
	NDQLC.DISCOUNT_NAME 
		WHEN 
		NDQLC.SOURCE_REPORTED_PROMOTION_NAME IS NULL 
		THEN 
		NDQLC.DISCOUNT_NAME 
	ELSE NDQLC.SOURCE_REPORTED_PROMOTION_NAME 
END AS 
DRVD_PROMOTION_NAME, 
NDQLC.SOURCE_REPORTED_PROMOTION_CD, 
CONCESSION_PERCENT, CONCESSION_USD_AMT, 
'Y' AS ACTIVE_YORN, 
'' AS HPEFIX_YORN
FROM   
(
	SELECT 
	BK_DEAL_ID, 
	PRODUCT_KEY, 
	SUB_PROMOTION_DESCR 
	FROM 
	$$SLSORDVWDB.MT_2TIER_INCENTIVE_BKGS_MSR 
	GROUP BY 
	1,2,3
) TIER
LEFT OUTER JOIN 
$$SLSORDVWDB.N_DEAL_QUOTE NDQ 
ON TIER.BK_DEAL_ID = NDQ.BK_DEAL_ID AND NDQ.ACTIVE_FLG = 'Y'
LEFT OUTER JOIN 
$$SLSORDVWDB.N_DEAL_QUOTE_LINE NDQL 
ON NDQ.BK_QUOTE_NUM = NDQL.  BK_QUOTE_NUM  
AND NDQL.ACTIVE_FLG = 'Y'     
LEFT OUTER JOIN 
$$SLSORDVWDB.N_DEAL_QUOTE_LINE_CONCESSION NDQLC 
ON  NDQLC.BK_DEAL_QUOTE_LINE_KEY=NDQL.BK_DEAL_QUOTE_LINE_KEY 
AND TIER.PRODUCT_KEY=NDQL.PRODUCT_KEY
INNER JOIN 
$$COMREFVWDB.R_PRODUCTS R 
ON R.ITEM_KEY=TIER.PRODUCT_KEY
WHERE 1 = 1 
AND  TIER.BK_DEAL_ID IS NOT NULL
AND NDQ.ACTIVE_FLG = 'Y'
AND (NDQ.IS_STRINGENT_FLG='Y' OR NDQ.IS_FINALIZED_FLG='Y')
AND NDQL.ACTIVE_FLG = 'Y'
GROUP BY 
1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8

SELECT 
WI.BK_DEAL_ID,
WI.PRODUCT_ID,
CASE 
	WHEN 
	NPI.PRICING_INCENTIVE_TYPE_CD  IN ('BASE DISCOUNT') 
	THEN 
	WI.PROMOTION_NAME 
END BASE_DISCOUNT_NAME_LINE_LEVEL,
CASE 
	WHEN 
	NPI.PRICING_INCENTIVE_TYPE_CD  IN ('BASE DISCOUNT') 
	THEN 
	'Y' 
	ELSE 
	'N' 
END AS CTR_FLG
FROM 
$$STGDB.WI_SO_POS_DISCOUNT_NAME WI
LEFT OUTER JOIN 
$$SLSORDVWDB.N_PRICING_INCENTIVE NPI 
ON  WI.PROMOTION_NAME=NPI.BK_PRICING_INCENTIVE_NAME
WHERE 
(BK_DEAL_ID ,PRODUCT_ID) IN
(
	SELECT 
	TEMP.BK_DEAL_ID,
	TEMP.PRODUCT_ID 
	FROM  
	$$STGDB.WI_SO_POS_LL_NAMES TEMP,
	(
		SELECT 
		BK_DEAL_ID ,
		PRODUCT_ID ,
		COUNT(DISTINCT COALESCE(BASE_DISCOUNT_NAME_LINE_LEVEL ,'UNK')) CNT 
		FROM 
		$$STGDB.WI_SO_POS_LL_NAMES
		GROUP BY 1,2
		HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT COALESCE(BASE_DISCOUNT_NAME_LINE_LEVEL ,'UNK'))=1
	) A
	WHERE 
	TEMP.BK_DEAL_ID=A.BK_DEAL_ID
	AND TEMP.PRODUCT_ID=A.PRODUCT_ID
	AND TEMP.BASE_DISCOUNT_NAME_LINE_LEVEL  IS NULL
)
AND BASE_DISCOUNT_NAME_LINE_LEVEL  IS NOT NULL
AND  WI.BK_DEAL_ID <>'-9999'
AND WI.DISCOUNT_PERCENT  <> 0 
AND WI.SOURCE_REPORTED_PROMOTION_CD NOT LIKE 'PP%'
GROUP BY 
1,2,3,4

/*ERP Snapshot active Lines*/
SELECT 
ERP.BK_DEAL_ID,
R.BK_PRODUCT_ID,
EL.PROMOTION_NAME,
CASE   
	WHEN 
	NDQLC.SOURCE_REPORTED_PROMOTION_NAME = 'UNKNOWN' 
	THEN 
	NDQLC.DISCOUNT_NAME 
		WHEN 
		NDQLC.SOURCE_REPORTED_PROMOTION_NAME IS NULL 
		THEN 
		NDQLC.DISCOUNT_NAME 
	ELSE 
	NDQLC.SOURCE_REPORTED_PROMOTION_NAME 
END AS 
DRVD_PROMOTION_NAME,
NDQLC.SOURCE_REPORTED_PROMOTION_CD,
NDQLC.CONCESSION_PERCENT, 
NDQLC.CONCESSION_USD_AMT, 
'Y' AS ACTIVE_YORN, 
'' AS HPEFIX_YORN
FROM
(  sel BK_DEAL_ID, PRODUCT_KEY  from     $$STGDB.WI_ERP_AR_BOOKINGS_INIT_2  group by 1,2 ) ERP
LEFT OUTER JOIN  
$$SLSORDVWDB.N_DEAL_QUOTE NDQ 
ON  (ERP.BK_DEAL_ID = NDQ.BK_DEAL_ID AND NDQ.ACTIVE_FLG = 'Y')
LEFT OUTER JOIN 
$$SLSORDVWDB.N_DEAL_QUOTE_LINE NDQL 
ON (NDQ.BK_QUOTE_NUM   = NDQL.BK_QUOTE_NUM AND ERP.PRODUCT_KEY=NDQL.PRODUCT_KEY AND NDQL.ACTIVE_FLG = 'Y'  )
LEFT OUTER JOIN 
$$SLSORDVWDB.N_DEAL_QUOTE_LINE_CONCESSION NDQLC 
ON NDQLC.BK_DEAL_QUOTE_LINE_KEY=NDQL.BK_DEAL_QUOTE_LINE_KEY
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_PRODUCTS R 
ON R.ITEM_KEY=ERP.PRODUCT_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_SALES_ORDER_DEALS_INT_1 EL 
ON (ERP.BK_DEAL_ID = EL.bk_DEAL_ID AND EL. bk_DEAL_ID IS NOT NULL)
WHERE 
1 = 1
AND NDQ.ACTIVE_FLG = 'Y' 
AND (NDQ.IS_STRINGENT_FLG='Y' OR NDQ.IS_FINALIZED_FLG='Y')
GROUP BY 
1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8,9

SELECT 
WI.BK_DEAL_ID,WI.PRODUCT_ID,
CASE 
	WHEN 
	NPI.PRICING_INCENTIVE_TYPE_CD IN ('PROMOTION') 
	THEN 
	WI.PROMOTION_NAME 
END LIST_OF_PROMOTION_LINE_LEVEL,
CASE 
	WHEN 
	NPI.PRICING_INCENTIVE_TYPE_CD  IN ('PROMOTION') 
	THEN 
	'Y' 
	ELSE 
	'N' 
END AS CTR_FLG 
FROM  
$$STGDB.WI_SO_POS_DISCOUNT_NAME WI
LEFT OUTER JOIN 
$$SLSORDVWDB.N_PRICING_INCENTIVE NPI 
ON  WI.PROMOTION_NAME=NPI.BK_PRICING_INCENTIVE_NAME
WHERE 
(BK_DEAL_ID ,PRODUCT_ID) IN
(
	SELECT 
	TEMP.BK_DEAL_ID,
	TEMP.PRODUCT_ID
	FROM 
	$$STGDB.WI_SO_POS_LL_NAMES TEMP,
	(
		SELECT 
		BK_DEAL_ID ,
		PRODUCT_ID ,
		COUNT(DISTINCT COALESCE(LIST_OF_PROMOTION_LINE_LEVEL,'UNK')) CNT 
		FROM 
		$$STGDB.WI_SO_POS_LL_NAMES
		GROUP BY 
		1,2
		HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT COALESCE(LIST_OF_PROMOTION_LINE_LEVEL,'UNK'))=1
	) A
	WHERE 
	TEMP.BK_DEAL_ID=A.BK_DEAL_ID
	AND TEMP.PRODUCT_ID=A.PRODUCT_ID
	AND TEMP.LIST_OF_PROMOTION_LINE_LEVEL IS NULL
)
AND LIST_OF_PROMOTION_LINE_LEVEL IS NOT NULL
AND WI.BK_DEAL_ID <>'-9999'
AND WI.DISCOUNT_PERCENT  <> 0 
AND WI.SOURCE_REPORTED_PROMOTION_CD NOT LIKE 'PP%'
GROUP BY 
1,2,3,4

/*ERP Snapshot Inactive Lines*/
SELECT 
A.BK_DEAL_ID, 
A.BK_PRODUCT_ID, 
A.PROMOTION_NAME, 
A.DRVD_PROMOTION_NAME, 
SOURCE_REPORTED_PROMOTION_CD, 
CONCESSION_PERCENT, 
CONCESSION_USD_AMT, 
'N' AS ACTIVE_YORN, 
'' AS HPEFIX_YORN
FROM 
(
	SELECT  
	NDQ.BK_DEAL_ID,
	R.BK_PRODUCT_ID, 
	EL.PROMOTION_NAME,
	CASE   
		WHEN 
		NDQLC.SOURCE_REPORTED_PROMOTION_NAME = 'UNKNOWN' 
		THEN 
		NDQLC.DISCOUNT_NAME 
			WHEN 
			NDQLC.SOURCE_REPORTED_PROMOTION_NAME IS NULL 
			THEN 
			NDQLC.DISCOUNT_NAME 
		ELSE NDQLC.SOURCE_REPORTED_PROMOTION_NAME 
	END AS 
	DRVD_PROMOTION_NAME,
	NDQLC.SOURCE_REPORTED_PROMOTION_CD,
	NDQL.SOURCE_UPDATED_DTM, 
	CONCESSION_PERCENT, 
	CONCESSION_USD_AMT
	FROM  
	(select 
		BK_DEAL_ID 
		from  
		$$STGDB.WI_ERP_AR_BOOKINGS_INIT_2   
		group by 1   
	) ERP 
	INNER JOIN 
	$$STGDB.WI_SO_POS_DISCOUNT_NAME POS 
	ON ERP.BK_DEAL_ID = POS.BK_DEAL_ID  
	LEFT OUTER JOIN 
	$$SLSORDVWDB.N_DEAL_QUOTE NDQ 
	ON  ERP.BK_DEAL_ID = NDQ.BK_DEAL_ID
	LEFT OUTER JOIN 
	( SELECT 
		BK_QUOTE_NUM, 
		BK_DEAL_QUOTE_LINE_KEY, 
		PRODUCT_KEY, 
		SOURCE_UPDATED_DTM, 
		ACTIVE_FLG 
		FROM 
		$$SLSORDVWDB.N_DEAL_QUOTE_LINE 
		WHERE 
		ACTIVE_FLG = 'N' QUALIFY dense_rank() OVER (PARTITION BY BK_QUOTE_NUM,PRODUCT_KEY 
		ORDER BY  
		SOURCE_UPDATED_DTM DESC) = 1 
		GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5 
	) NDQL 
	ON NDQ.BK_QUOTE_NUM   = NDQL.BK_QUOTE_NUM
	LEFT OUTER JOIN 
	$$SLSORDVWDB.N_DEAL_QUOTE_LINE_CONCESSION NDQLC 
	ON NDQLC.BK_DEAL_QUOTE_LINE_KEY = NDQL.BK_DEAL_QUOTE_LINE_KEY
	LEFT OUTER JOIN 
	$$STGDB.WI_SALES_ORDER_DEALS_INT_1 EL 
	ON  EL.bk_DEAL_ID = NDQ.BK_DEAL_ID AND EL.bk_DEAL_ID IS NOT NULL
	INNER JOIN  
	$$COMREFVWDB.R_PRODUCTS R 
	ON R.ITEM_KEY=NDQL.PRODUCT_KEY AND POS.PRODUCT_ID = R.BK_PRODUCT_ID
	WHERE 1 = 1
	AND NDQ.ACTIVE_FLG = 'Y'  
	AND (NDQ.IS_STRINGENT_FLG='Y' OR NDQ.IS_FINALIZED_FLG='Y')
	AND POS.DISCOUNT_NAME IS NULL
	GROUP BY 
	1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8
) 
A

/*POS Snapshot Inactive Lines*/
SELECT 
A.BK_DEAL_ID, 
A.BK_PRODUCT_ID, 
A.SUB_PROMOTION_DESCR, 
A.DRVD_PROMOTION_NAME, 
SOURCE_REPORTED_PROMOTION_CD, 
CONCESSION_PERCENT, 
CONCESSION_USD_AMT, 
'N' AS ACTIVE_YORN, 
'' AS HPEFIX_YORN
FROM 
( 
	SELECT  
	NDQ.BK_DEAL_ID,
	R.BK_PRODUCT_ID, 
	TIER.SUB_PROMOTION_DESCR,
	CASE   
		WHEN 
		NDQLC.SOURCE_REPORTED_PROMOTION_NAME = 'UNKNOWN' 
		THEN 
		NDQLC.DISCOUNT_NAME 
			WHEN 
			NDQLC.SOURCE_REPORTED_PROMOTION_NAME IS NULL 
			THEN 
			NDQLC.DISCOUNT_NAME 
		ELSE 
		NDQLC.SOURCE_REPORTED_PROMOTION_NAME 
	END AS 
	DRVD_PROMOTION_NAME,
	NDQLC.SOURCE_REPORTED_PROMOTION_CD,
	NDQL.SOURCE_UPDATED_DTM, 
	CONCESSION_PERCENT, 
	CONCESSION_USD_AMT
	FROM 
	(
		select
		BK_DEAL_ID, 
		PRODUCT_KEY,
		SUB_PROMOTION_DESCR 
		FROM 
		$$SLSORDVWDB.MT_2TIER_INCENTIVE_BKGS_MSR  
		GROUP BY 
		1,2,3
	) TIER 
	INNER JOIN 
	$$STGDB.WI_SO_POS_DISCOUNT_NAME POS 
	ON TIER.BK_DEAL_ID = POS.BK_DEAL_ID  
	LEFT OUTER JOIN 
	$$SLSORDVWDB.N_DEAL_QUOTE NDQ 
	ON  TIER.BK_DEAL_ID = NDQ.BK_DEAL_ID
	LEFT OUTER JOIN 
	( 
		SELECT 
		BK_QUOTE_NUM, 
		BK_DEAL_QUOTE_LINE_KEY, 
		PRODUCT_KEY, 
		SOURCE_UPDATED_DTM, 
		ACTIVE_FLG 
		FROM 
		$$SLSORDVWDB.N_DEAL_QUOTE_LINE 
		WHERE 
		ACTIVE_FLG = 'N' QUALIFY dense_rank() OVER (PARTITION BY BK_QUOTE_NUM,PRODUCT_KEY ORDER BY  SOURCE_UPDATED_DTM DESC) = 1 GROUP BY 
		1,2,3,4,5 
	) NDQL 
	ON NDQ.BK_QUOTE_NUM   = NDQL.BK_QUOTE_NUM
	LEFT OUTER JOIN 
	$$SLSORDVWDB.N_DEAL_QUOTE_LINE_CONCESSION NDQLC 
	ON NDQLC.BK_DEAL_QUOTE_LINE_KEY = NDQL.BK_DEAL_QUOTE_LINE_KEY
	INNER JOIN 
	$$COMREFVWDB.R_PRODUCTS R 
	ON R.ITEM_KEY=NDQL.PRODUCT_KEY AND POS.PRODUCT_ID = R.BK_PRODUCT_ID
	WHERE 
	1 = 1 
	AND NDQ.ACTIVE_FLG = 'Y'  
	AND(NDQ.IS_STRINGENT_FLG='Y' OR NDQ.IS_FINALIZED_FLG='Y')
	AND POS.DISCOUNT_NAME IS NULL
	GROUP BY 
	1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8
	) 
A

SELECT 
WI.BK_DEAL_ID,
WI.PRODUCT_ID,                    
CASE 
	WHEN 
	NPI.PRICING_INCENTIVE_TYPE_CD  IN ('PROMOTION') 
	THEN 
	WI.DISCOUNT_NAME 
END LIST_OF_PROMOTION_LINE_LEVEL,
CASE 
	WHEN 
	NPI.PRICING_INCENTIVE_TYPE_CD  IN ('BASE DISCOUNT') 
	THEN 
	WI.DISCOUNT_NAME 
END BASE_DISCOUNT_NAME_LINE_LEVEL,
CASE 
	WHEN 
	NPI.PRICING_INCENTIVE_TYPE_CD  IN ('NON-STANDARD') 
	THEN 
	WI.DISCOUNT_NAME 
END NON_STANDARD_NAME_LINE_LEVEL,
CASE 
	WHEN 
	NPI.PRICING_INCENTIVE_TYPE_CD  IN ('PROMOTION','BASE DISCOUNT','NON-STANDARD') 
	THEN 
	'Y' 
	ELSE 
	'N' 
END AS CTR_FLG
FROM 
$$STGDB.WI_SO_POS_DISCOUNT_NAME WI 
LEFT OUTER JOIN 
$$SLSORDVWDB.N_PRICING_INCENTIVE NPI 
ON  WI.DISCOUNT_NAME=NPI.BK_PRICING_INCENTIVE_NAME
WHERE 
WI.DISCOUNT_PERCENT  <> 0 
AND WI.SOURCE_REPORTED_PROMOTION_CD NOT LIKE 'PP%'
GROUP BY 
1,2,3,4,5,6
